## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're facing.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when I have to..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe a concrete scenario where this feature would be useful.

1. Open a document with ...
2. Use the feature to ...
3. The result is ...

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references to similar features in other tools.
